title: Contact Max - Max Wilkinson MP
headings: h2: Potholes, fly-tipping or issues in your area?
h3: Report missed bin collections, abandoned vehicles, fly-tipping, graffiti, dog fouling and other issues in your area with Fix My Street.
h2: Need advice on an issue?
h3: You can find written advice guides on a range of issues, from debt to housing, from Citizens Advice.
h2: Need support from the Council?
h3: Cheltenham Borough Council covers many local issues, from bin collections to climate change.
text_excerpt: Contact Max - Max Wilkinson MP Skip to main content Max Wilkinson MP Contact Max Meet Max Wilkinson Max's Campaigns News Donate Join Donate Join Max's Campaigns Film-style age limits for social media Max on Race Week Max on the Environment Max on the Economy Max on the NHS New GP Surgery for Cheltenham Back Jools' Law Reopen The Aveta Birth Centre Don't Let Cheltenham Lose Its Voice Save Our Recycling Centre 2025 Back Max's Sunshine Bill Scrap Labour's Winter Fuel Cuts Fix Our High Street News 2026 2025 2024 Contact Max Max Wilkinson is your MP for Cheltenham. Working for you all year round, not just at election times. Contact Max Wilkinson MP ✉️ For Max Wilkinson, 16 Hewlett Road, Cheltenham GL52 6AA 💻 max.wilkinson.mp@parliament.uk 📱 twitter.com/mpmwilko 🖥️ www.facebook.com/MaxWilkinsonCheltenham/ Helpful contacts Other sources of help and support. Potholes, fly-tipping or issues in your area? Report missed bin collections, abandoned vehicles, fly-tipping, graffiti, dog fouling and other issues in your area with Fix My Street. Fix my Street View Need advice on an issue? You can find written advice guides on a range of issues, from debt to housing, from Citizens Advice. Citizens Advice View Need support from the Council? Cheltenham Borough Council covers many local issues, from bin collections to climate change. Cheltenham Borough Council View The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
